---
title: "group_norm"
generated: true
description: "GroupNorm for channels-first n-D inputs, with backend dispatch."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.nn.norm`](../nitrix-nn-norm.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:group_norm -->
```python
group_norm(x: Float[Array, 'n c *spatial'], num_groups: int, weight: Optional[Float[Array, 'c']] = None, bias: Optional[Float[Array, 'c']] = None, *, eps: float = 1e-05, out_scale: float = 1.0, backend: Backend = 'auto') -> Float[Array, 'n c *spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:group_norm -->
GroupNorm for channels-first n-D inputs, with backend dispatch.

Splits the channel axis of a channels-first `(N, C, *spatial)` input into
`num_groups` groups and standardises each sample and group over its
`(C / num_groups, *spatial)` elements to zero mean and unit variance
(biased). It then applies the optional per-channel affine transform and the
`out_scale` depth-scaling factor, matching the
[`reference_group_norm`](../nitrix-nn-norm/reference_group_norm.qmd) oracle.

When the resolved backend is `pallas-cuda` the fused kernel is attempted;
if it cannot run for the given shape or host, the call falls back loudly to
the JAX reference.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:group_norm -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Float` | `n` √ó `c` √ó `*spatial` | ‚Äî | Channels-first input with a batch axis `n`, channel axis `c` and zero or more trailing spatial axes. |
| `num_groups` | `int` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Number of channel groups; must divide the channel count `c` exactly. |
| `weight` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'c']]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Per-channel affine scale of shape `(c,)`. If omitted, no scaling is applied. |
| `bias` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'c']]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Per-channel affine shift of shape `(c,)`. If omitted, no shift is applied. |
| `eps` | `float` | ‚Äî | `1e-05` | Constant added to the variance before the reciprocal square root, for numerical stability. |
| `out_scale` | `float` | ‚Äî | `1.0` | Depth-scaling multiplier applied to the full affine output. |
| `backend` | `Backend` | ‚Äî | `'auto'` | Execution backend. `'auto'` resolves to `'pallas-cuda'` on a capable GPU and `'jax'` otherwise. |

**Returns** `Float` ‚Äî shape `n` √ó `c` √ó `*spatial`. The normalised, affine-transformed and depth-scaled array, with the same shape and dtype as `x`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:group_norm -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
